cause_analysis.narrative: Waxxotic llc churned on 2026-03-21 after 238 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-18 via app_chat — 93 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 93 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-01 via sms, client wrote: "Thank you 🙏 All set…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-01 via sms, client wrote: "Loved “Thank you so much for your support:)”…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

Subject: Checking In – Here Whenever You're Ready\n\nBody: Hi Nicole, I hope you're doing well!
